title: 1.1: Tests that SharedIterations executor Run method returns no error when all iterations complete successfully
1.2: Tests that SharedIterations executor returns correct iteration distribution when one VU is slower than others
1.3: Tests that SharedIterations executor returns dropped iterations metric when iterations cannot complete within duration
1.4: Tests that SharedIterations executor returns correct global iteration indices when run across different execution segments
1.6: Tests that the slow VU exact iteration count is asserted using assert.Equal
2.1: Places the test for baseline iteration completion in lib/executor directory
2.2: Places the test for variable VU workload distribution in lib/executor directory
2.3: Places the test for dropped iterations metrics in lib/executor directory
2.4: Places the test for global iteration indexing in lib/executor directory
3.1: All tests use the Go testing framework with testing.T parameter
3.2: All tests follow the Test<FunctionName> naming pattern
3.3: All tests use testify assertion library for assertions
4.1: Follows setupExecutorTest helper pattern for test case that verifies baseline iteration completion
4.2: Follows simpleRunner helper pattern for test case that verifies variable VU workload distribution
